stemHtml: During unlawful interference when ATS contact cannot be established, the pilot should…

options.a: Fly at a level differing by 500 ft from normal IFR levels where a 1000 ft VSM applies.
options.b: Fly at a level differing by 1000 ft where a 500 ft VSM applies.
options.c: Fly at a level differing by 2000 ft where a 1300 ft VSM applies.
options.d: Fly at a level differing by 1000 ft where a 1000 ft VSM applies.
